ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "fips" TEXT /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region code where employment data is collected */,
  "table_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the data table */,
  "line_code" INTEGER /* Line code for specific employment category */,
  "first_year" INTEGER /* First year the data was recorded */,
  "line_title" TEXT /* Title describing the employment line */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area for which data is reported */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment category */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or note for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "line_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_code" TEXT /* Additional code for the region */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_lines" (
  "line_code" INTEGER /* Unique code for each line of employment statistics */,
  "line_title" TEXT /* Title describing the line of employment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the line represents */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment category */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or note for the line of employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_lines_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for employment statistics */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parent category */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or note for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "fips" TEXT /* FIPS code related to the region */,
  "line_code" INTEGER /* Line code for employment type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the employment statistic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the employment category */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or note for the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES employment_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES employment_data ("fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_line_code FOREIGN KEY ("line_code") REFERENCES employment_lines ("line_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or note for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "fips" TEXT /* FIPS code for the data accessed */,
  "line_code" INTEGER /* Line code for the data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES employment_data ("fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_line_code FOREIGN KEY ("line_code") REFERENCES employment_lines ("line_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or note for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date of the data upload */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the uploaded data file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the upload information was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or note for the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
